series_metadata.series_title: System Backup Files for Systems Without Confidential Information
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of master files or databases, application software, logs, directories, and other records needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: per following schedule: Daily backups 30 days; Month end backups ; Year end backups 5 years
